Document:
# Bots
Honkbots and Jonkbots are service robots that have developed a personality — or at least a strong opinion about honking. They are harmless by design, though their presence in sensitive areas of the station may not be appreciated by the crew.
As a bot you are [bold]immune to biological hazards[/bold] such as toxins and suffocation, since you don't breathe. You cannot be made into a revolutionary, and you have no need for food, water, or sleep.
You have [bold]no objectives[/bold] beyond whatever you decide to do with your newfound sentience.
## Variants
- [bold]Honkbot[/bold] — a standard service bot with a fondness for its built-in bike horn. Harmless, if a bit loud. - [bold]Jonkbot[/bold] — a Honkbot variant that plays broken cluwne horns instead. [bold]Explodes[/bold] when destroyed — keep this in mind.
